executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped the authoritative cross-cutting capture-as-fallback policy referenced by specs 061/064/066/068/069 but owned by none. 11 BDD scenarios (SCN-074-A01..A11) cover the trigger contract, provenance distinction from spec 008 explicit captures, same-user dedup window (in and out), forbidden cross-user dedup, abandoned-clarification fallback, IntentTrace + counter wiring, fail-loud SST, inviolability of the policy, no-content-interpretation-at-capture-time, and identical acknowledgement shape across all transports.

Created design.md for capture-as-fallback policy, resolving the central policy module, provenance metadata table, strict per-user dedup, abandoned clarification handling, canonical acknowledgement, fail-loud SST, and scenario-to-test mapping for SCN-074-A01..A11.

Created planning artifacts for SCN-074-A01..A11: five sequential scopes, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, uservalidation.md, and planning-only report.md. Status remains in_progress with planMaturityOnly=true.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.
